permits.description: tenant improvment of southeast health center 2401 keith st clinic building. interior scope includes modified partitions, finishes, improvements to mechanical, electrical, plumbing, fire protection/alarm systems, glazing replacement and modifications to sidewalk landscape area along armstrong av.

interior renovation of an existing primary care health clinic including new exam rooms,dental suite,lobby,reception & registration,staff workgroup spaces,phlebotomy and podiatry exam rooms, and a server room; maher n/a

disconnect old & install new boiler/flue, disconnect & reconnect gas for boiler, disconnect & install new rooftop ac unit & transition curb, disconnect & reconnect conderisate for new rooftop unit, remove (e) constant volume box & replace with new vav box, replace pneumatic controls w/ddc controls
general building renovation for ada. construct ada parking at (e) parking lot.
install (218) sprinklers throughout per nfpa#13. underground per nfpa# 24 & relocate (1) existing fire department connection to front lawn b.a.# 2019-0506-9853
